assert_BatchConsistent.condition:
cursor > N implies
        \A k in 1..N :
            (Verifiers[k].is_dict and Verifiers[k].has_cond) implies
                \E c in compiled : c.name = Verifiers[k].name
assert_BatchConsistent.message:
Assertion failed: BatchConsistent — cursor > N =>
        \A k \in 1..N :
            (Verifiers[k].is_dict /\ Verifiers[k].has_cond) =>
                ...
assert_BatchConsistent.description: Test assertion for BatchConsistent from go_profile_file_validity spec

assert_HelperIncluded.condition:
helper_needed implies
        (stage in {"vet", "list", "run", "done"} implies passed = TRUE)
assert_HelperIncluded.message:
Assertion failed: HelperIncluded — helper_needed =>
        (stage \in {"vet", "list", "run", "done"} => passed = TRUE)
assert_HelperIncluded.description: Test assertion for HelperIncluded from go_profile_file_validity spec

assert_StageOrdering.description: Test assertion for StageOrdering from go_profile_file_validity spec

assert_VetPassedWhenDone.message: Assertion failed: VetPassedWhenDone — stage = "done" => passed = TRUE
